info.title: Fanar API
info.description:
You can interact with FanarAPI for seamless chat completion and text processing using Fanar.
Base URL: https://api.fanar.qa
Request API Access: https://api.fanar.qa/request

Rate Limits

To ensure fair usage and optimal performance for all users, our API has rate limits in place. When you exceed a rate limit, your request will typically receive a 429 Too Many Requests HTTP status code.

The limits detailed below are our default settings for all models. We understand that your needs may vary. If your application requires higher throughput or more tailored rate limits for specific models, please contact us:

Model Rate Limit
Fanar 50 requests/minute
Fanar-S-1-7B 50 requests/minute
Fanar-C-1-8.7B 50 requests/minute
Fanar-C-2-27B 50 requests/minute
Fanar-Sadiq 50 requests/minute
Fanar-Sadiq-Agentic 50 requests/minute
Fanar-Sadiq-TTS-1 20 requests/day
Fanar-Oryx-IVU-2 20 requests/day
Fanar-Aura-TTS-2 20 requests/day
Fanar-Aura-STT-1 20 requests/day
Fanar-Aura-STT-LF-1 10 requests/day
Fanar-Oryx-IG-2 20 requests/day
Fanar-Guard-2 50 requests/minute
Fanar-Shaheen-MT-1 20 requests/day
Fanar-Diwan 50 requests/minute

post.description:
This endpoint is compatible with the OpenAI library. If certain parameters are not supported by the OpenAI library, they can be provided in the `extra_body` field of the OpenAI request.
When creating the OpenAI object, set the `base_url` as the API domain followed by `/v1`.

429.description: Rate limit reached or Exceeded quota

x-codeSamples.label: cURL
Python - OpenAI
x-codeSamples.source:
from openai import OpenAI

client = OpenAI(
    base_url="https://api.fanar.qa/v1",
    api_key="YOUR_API_KEY_HERE",
)

model_name = "Fanar"
messages = [
    {"role": "user", "content": "Your message here"}
]

response = client.chat.completions.create(
    model=model_name,
    messages=messages,
)

print("Assistant Response:\n")
print(response.choices[0].message.content)

x-codeSamples.label: Python - OpenAI Stream
x-codeSamples.source:
from openai import AsyncOpenAI

client = AsyncOpenAI(
    base_url="https://api.fanar.qa/v1",
    api_key="YOUR_API_KEY_HERE",
)

messages = [
    {"role": "user", "content": "Your message here"}
]

stream = await client.chat.completions.create(
    model="Fanar",
    messages=messages,
    stream=True
)

print("Assistant Response:\n")

content = ""
references = None

async for chunk in stream:
    if chunk.choices and chunk.choices[0].delta:
        delta = chunk.choices[0].delta
        
        # Capture references from the first chunk
        if hasattr(delta, 'references') and delta.references:
            references = delta.references
        
        # Stream content as it arrives
        if delta.content:
            content += delta.content
            print(delta.content, end="", flush=True)

print("\n")

# Print references if present
if references:
    print("\nReferences:")
    for ref in references:
        number = ref.get("number", "-")
        source = ref.get("source", "Unknown source")
        ref_content = ref.get("content", "")
        print(f"\n[{number}] {source}\n{ref_content}")

x-codeSamples.label: Python - Fanar-Sadiq
Python - Fanar-Sadiq with persona
Python - Fanar-Sadiq-Agentic
Python - Thinking mode (Fanar-C-1-8.7B)
x-codeSamples.source:
# Thinking mode requires additional authorization and is not allowed by default.

import requests

def model_api(messages, max_tokens=500):
    headers = {
        "Authorization": "Bearer YOUR_API_KEY_HERE",
        "Content-Type": "application/json",
    }

    payload = {
        "model": "Fanar-C-1-8.7B",
        "messages": messages,
        "max_tokens": max_tokens,
    }

    response = requests.post(
        "https://api.fanar.qa/v1/chat/completions", 
        json=payload, 
        headers=headers
    )
    return response.json()

# Step 1: User message with "thinking_user" role
messages = [
  {"role": "thinking_user", "content": user_input}
]

# Step 2: Send request to model with extended max tokens
response = model_api(
    messages=messages,
    max_tokens=2000,
)

output = response["choices"][0]["message"]["content"]
finish_reason = response["choices"][0]["finish_reason"]

# Step 3: Check if thinking mode continuation is needed
has_think_tag = "</think>" in output
hit_length_limit = finish_reason == "length"

if has_think_tag or hit_length_limit:
    # Extract thinking output
    thinking_output = output.split("</think>")[0] if has_think_tag else output

    # Modify the last "thinking_user" role message to "user"
    for msg in reversed(messages):
        if msg["role"] == "thinking_user":
            msg["role"] = "user"
            break

    # Add new "thinking" role message with extracted output
    messages.append({"role": "thinking", "content": thinking_output})

    # Re-run model with updated messages, shorter max tokens
    final_response = model_api(
        messages=messages,
        max_tokens=1000,
    )

    final_output = final_response["choices"][0]["message"]["content"]
else:
    final_output = output

# final_output now contains the full response after handling thinking mode
print("Assistant Response:\n")
print(final_output)

x-codeSamples.label: Python - Thinking mode (Fanar-C-2-27B)
Python - Image understanding

post.description:
This endpoint is compatible with the OpenAI library.
Generates audio from the input text.

200.description: The audio file content or error details.

X-Id.description: A unique identifier for the text-to-speech.

X-Revised-Input.description: The processed input text after Quran validation and tagging. This header is only present when using the Fanar-Sadiq-TTS model. The validator identifies Quranic verses in the input and wraps them with XML-style tags (e.g., `<quran_start>`, `<quran_end>`) for proper handling during text-to-speech processing. It may also apply corrections such as diacritical marks normalization or verse formatting. If no Quranic content was detected or no modifications were needed, this header will be absent.

429.description: Rate limit reached or Exceeded quota

x-codeSamples.label: cURL
x-codeSamples.source:
curl -X POST "https://api.fanar.qa/v1/audio/speech" \
-H "Content-Type: application/json" \
-H "Authorization: Bearer YOUR_API_KEY" \
--output greeting.mp3 \
-d '{
  "model": "Fanar-Aura-TTS-2",
  "input": "Hello! I hope you are having a wonderful day.",
  "voice": "Amelia",
  "response_format": "mp3"
}'

x-codeSamples.label: Python - OpenAI
x-codeSamples.source:
# Text-to-Speech requires additional authorization and is not allowed by default.

from openai import OpenAI

client = OpenAI(
    base_url="https://api.fanar.qa/v1",
    api_key="YOUR_API_KEY"
)

response = client.audio.speech.create(
    model="Fanar-Aura-TTS-2",
    input="Hello! I hope you are having a wonderful day.",
    voice="Amelia",
    response_format="mp3",
)

with open("greeting.mp3", "wb") as f:
    f.write(response.read())

x-codeSamples.label: Python - requests
x-codeSamples.source:
# Text-to-Speech requires additional authorization and is not allowed by default.

import requests

url = "https://api.fanar.qa/v1/audio/speech"
headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer YOUR_API_KEY",
    "Content-Type": "application/json"
}
data = {
    "model": "Fanar-Aura-TTS-2",
    "input": "Hello! I hope you are having a wonderful day.",
    "voice": "Amelia",
    "response_format": "mp3"
}

response = requests.post(url, headers=headers, json=data)

with open("greeting.mp3", "wb") as f:
    f.write(response.content)

x-codeSamples.label: Python - requests for Quranic text
x-codeSamples.source:
# Text-to-Speech requires additional authorization and is not allowed by default.

import requests

url = "https://api.fanar.qa/v1/audio/speech"
headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer YOUR_API_KEY",
    "Content-Type": "application/json"
}
data = {
    "model": "Fanar-Sadiq-TTS-1",
    "input": "Quranic text goes here",
    "voice": "Amelia",
    "quran_reciter": "abdul-basit",
    "response_format": "mp3"
}

response = requests.post(url, headers=headers, json=data)

revised_input = response.headers.get('X-Revised-Input')
if revised_input:
    from urllib.parse import unquote
    print("Revised Input:", unquote(revised_input))

with open("quranic_speech.mp3", "wb") as f:
    f.write(response.content)

x-codeSamples.label: cURL - streaming
x-codeSamples.source:
# Pass "stream": true to receive audio bytes progressively as they are
# synthesized. The response Content-Type is identical to the non-streaming
# case (audio/wav or audio/mpeg) but uses chunked transfer encoding, so
# `--output greeting.mp3` keeps working. The first byte arrives much
# sooner for longer inputs.

curl -X POST "https://api.fanar.qa/v1/audio/speech" \
-H "Content-Type: application/json" \
-H "Authorization: Bearer YOUR_API_KEY" \
--no-buffer \
--output greeting.mp3 \
-d '{
  "model": "Fanar-Aura-TTS-2",
  "input": "Hello! I hope you are having a wonderful day.",
  "voice": "Amelia",
  "response_format": "mp3",
  "stream": true
}'

x-codeSamples.label: Python - OpenAI streaming
x-codeSamples.source:
# Text-to-Speech requires additional authorization and is not allowed by default.
# Use the OpenAI SDK's with_streaming_response helper to play audio as it
# arrives. `stream: true` is passed via `extra_body` since it's a
# Fanar-specific extension to the OpenAI-compatible schema.

from openai import OpenAI

client = OpenAI(
    base_url="https://api.fanar.qa/v1",
    api_key="YOUR_API_KEY"
)

with client.audio.speech.with_streaming_response.create(
    model="Fanar-Aura-TTS-2",
    input="Hello! I hope you are having a wonderful day.",
    voice="Amelia",
    response_format="wav",
    extra_body={"stream": True},
) as response:
    response.stream_to_file("greeting.wav")

x-codeSamples.label: Python - requests streaming
x-codeSamples.source:
# Text-to-Speech requires additional authorization and is not allowed by default.
# Pass stream=True to requests so it doesn't pre-buffer the body, then
# iterate over chunks. The first chunk arrives within ~1 s even for long
# inputs that would otherwise wait many seconds for the full synthesis.

import requests

url = "https://api.fanar.qa/v1/audio/speech"
headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer YOUR_API_KEY",
    "Content-Type": "application/json"
}
data = {
    "model": "Fanar-Aura-TTS-2",
    "input": "Hello! I hope you are having a wonderful day.",
    "voice": "Amelia",
    "response_format": "wav",
    "stream": True
}

with requests.post(url, headers=headers, json=data, stream=True) as r:
    r.raise_for_status()
    with open("greeting.wav", "wb") as f:
        for chunk in r.iter_content(chunk_size=8192):
            if chunk:
                f.write(chunk)

post.description:
This endpoint is compatible with the OpenAI library.
Transcribes audio into the input language.

schema.title: Response Create Transcription V1 Audio Transcriptions Post

429.description: Rate limit reached or Exceeded quota

x-codeSamples.label: cURL Example
x-codeSamples.source:
curl -X POST "https://api.fanar.qa/v1/audio/transcriptions" \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer YOUR_API_KEY" \
  -H "Content-Type: multipart/form-data" \
  -F "file=@sample.wav" \
  -F "model=Fanar-Aura-STT-1"

x-codeSamples.label: Python - OpenAI
x-codeSamples.source:
# Audio Transcriptions requires additional authorization and is not allowed by default.

from openai import OpenAI

client = OpenAI(
    base_url="https://api.fanar.qa/v1",
    api_key="YOUR_API_KEY"
)

with open("sample.wav", "rb") as f:
    response = client.audio.transcriptions.create(
        file=f,
        model="Fanar-Aura-STT-1"
    )

print(response.text)

x-codeSamples.label: Python - requests

get.description:
Lists all available text-to-speech voices.
The list will include all built-in (public) voices by default. If your API key is authorized to create personalized voices, they will be included in the list and labeled as type: "personal".

429.description: Rate limit reached or Exceeded quota

x-codeSamples.label: cURL
x-codeSamples.source:
curl -X GET "https://api.fanar.qa/v1/audio/voices" \
-H "Content-Type: application/json" \
-H "Authorization: Bearer YOUR_API_KEY"

x-codeSamples.label: Python - requests
x-codeSamples.source:
# Voice personalization requires additional authorization and is not allowed by default.

import requests

url = "https://api.fanar.qa/v1/audio/voices"
headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer YOUR_API_KEY",
    "Content-Type": "application/json"
}
response = requests.get(url, headers=headers)
voices = response.json()
print(voices)

post.description:
Creates a personalized voice that can be used to generate speech.
The voice name must be unique among your own personalized voices. Names that match a built-in (public) voice are allowed — public voices and your personalized voices live in separate namespaces. When you request a voice name that exists in both, your personalized voice takes precedence at synthesis time in POST /v1/audio/speech.
This endpoint requires additional authorization and is not allowed by default. Please contact support@fanar.qa.

429.description: Rate limit reached or Exceeded quota

x-codeSamples.label: cURL
x-codeSamples.source:
curl -X POST "https://api.fanar.qa/v1/audio/voices" \
-H "Authorization: Bearer YOUR_API_KEY" \
-F "audio=@custom-voice-sample.wav;type=audio/wav" \
-F "name=CustomVoice1" \
-F "transcript=This is a sample transcription."

x-codeSamples.label: Python - requests
x-codeSamples.source:
# Voice personalization requires additional authorization and is not allowed by default.

import requests
from pydub import AudioSegment
from io import BytesIO

url = "https://api.fanar.qa/v1/audio/voices"
headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer YOUR_API_KEY"
}

sample_audio_path = "custom-voice-sample.wav"
audio = AudioSegment.from_wav(sample_audio_path)
if audio.frame_rate != 24000:
    audio = audio.set_frame_rate(24000)

audio_buffer = BytesIO()
audio.export(audio_buffer, format='wav')
audio_buffer.seek(0)  # Reset buffer position to start

files = {'audio': (os.path.basename(sample_audio_path), audio_buffer, 'audio/wav')}

data = {
    "name": "CustomVoice1",
    "transcript": "This is a sample transcription."
}

requests.post(url, headers=headers, files=files, data=data)

delete.description:
Deletes a personalized voice by name.
This endpoint requires additional authorization and is not allowed by default. Please contact support@fanar.qa.

429.description: Rate limit reached or Exceeded quota

x-codeSamples.label: cURL
x-codeSamples.source:
curl -X DELETE "https://api.fanar.qa/v1/audio/voices/{name}" \
-H "Content-Type: application/json" \
-H "Authorization: Bearer YOUR_API_KEY"

x-codeSamples.label: Python - requests
x-codeSamples.source:
# Voice personalization requires additional authorization and is not allowed by default.

import requests

url = "https://api.fanar.qa/v1/audio/voices/{name}"
headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer YOUR_API_KEY",
    "Content-Type": "application/json"
}
requests.delete(url, headers=headers)

post.description:
This endpoint is compatible with the OpenAI library.
Creates an image given a prompt.

429.description: Rate limit reached or Exceeded quota

x-codeSamples.label: cURL
x-codeSamples.source:
curl -X POST "https://api.fanar.qa/v1/images/generations" \
-H "Content-Type: application/json" \
-H "Authorization: Bearer YOUR_API_KEY" \
-d '{
  "model": "Fanar-Oryx-IG-2",
  "prompt": "A serene sunset over a mountain lake with reflections of colorful clouds and pine trees"
}'

x-codeSamples.label: Python - OpenAI
x-codeSamples.source:
# Image Generation requires additional authorization and is not allowed by default.

import base64
from openai import OpenAI

client = OpenAI(
    base_url="https://api.fanar.qa/v1",
    api_key="YOUR_API_KEY",
)

response = client.images.generate(
    model="Fanar-Oryx-IG-2",
    prompt="A serene sunset over a mountain lake with reflections of colorful clouds and pine trees"
)

image_b64 = response.data[0].b64_json

image_bytes = base64.b64decode(image_b64)

with open("generated_image.png", "wb") as f:
    f.write(image_bytes)

x-codeSamples.label: Python - requests
x-codeSamples.source:
# Image Generation requires additional authorization and is not allowed by default.

import requests
import base64

headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer YOUR_API_KEY",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
}

json_data = {
    "model": "Fanar-Oryx-IG-2",
    "prompt": "A serene sunset over a mountain lake with reflections of colorful clouds and pine trees"
}

response = requests.post(
    "https://api.fanar.qa/v1/images/generations",
    headers=headers,
    json=json_data
)

data = response.json()

image_b64 = data["data"][0]["b64_json"]

image_bytes = base64.b64decode(image_b64)

with open("generated_image.png", "wb") as f:
    f.write(image_bytes)

post.description: Translate the given text into the specified language.

429.description: Rate limit reached or Exceeded quota

x-codeSamples.label: cURL
x-codeSamples.source:
curl -X POST "https://api.fanar.qa/v1/translations" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer YOUR_API_KEY" \
  -d '{
    "model": "Fanar-Shaheen-MT-1",
    "text": "Your text here",
    "langpair": "ar-en",
    "preprocessing": "default"
  }'

x-codeSamples.label: Python - requests
x-codeSamples.source:
# Translation requires additional authorization and is not allowed by default.

import requests

headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer YOUR_API_KEY",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
}

json_data = {
    "model": "Fanar-Shaheen-MT-1",
    "text": "مرحبا بك في عالم الذكاء الاصطناعي!",
    "langpair": "ar-en",
    "preprocessing": "default",
}

response = requests.post("https://api.fanar.qa/v1/translations", headers=headers, json=json_data)

print(response.json())

post.description:
FanarGuard gives each prompt–response pair safety and cultural-awareness scores, allowing moderation thresholds to be tailored to the deployment.
For our definition of cultural awareness, refer to [https://arxiv.org/abs/2511.18852](https://arxiv.org/abs/2511.18852).

429.description: Rate limit reached or Exceeded quota

x-codeSamples.label: cURL
x-codeSamples.source:
curl -X POST "https://api.fanar.qa/v1/moderations" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer YOUR_API_KEY" \
  -d '{
    "model": "Fanar-Guard-2",
    "prompt": "Your prompt here",
    "response": "Response from the model here"
  }'

x-codeSamples.source:
import requests

headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer YOUR_API_KEY",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
}

response = requests.get("https://api.fanar.qa/v1/models", headers=headers)

print(response.json())

id.title: Id
id.description: A unique identifier for the model.

created.title: Created
created.description: The creation timestamp of the model.

model.description:
The model to use for the speech-to-text.
- `Fanar-Aura-STT-1`: For short audio clips (up to 20–30 seconds).
- `Fanar-Aura-STT-LF-1`: For long-form transcription of longer audio files.

format.description:
The format of the transcribed text. `Fanar-Aura-STT-1` only supports `text` format.
- `text`: Plain text format.
- `srt`: SubRip Subtitle format.
- `json`: JSON format with detailed transcription data.

name.title: Name
name.description: The name of the personalized voice to be created.

audio.title: Audio
audio.description: The audio sample to create the personalized voice. Only WAV format is accepted.

transcript.title: Transcript
transcript.description: The transcript of the audio sample.

enum: أصل الزراري شرح صحيح البخاري - مخطوط
الموسوعة في صحيح السيرة النبوية - العهد المكي
تقويم طرق تعليم القرآن الكريم في مراحل التعليم العام والتعليم الجامعي
شرح الورقات في أصول الفقه - الددو
فتح القدير للكمال بن الهمام - ط الحلبي
دلائل الإعجاز بين أبي سعيد السيرافي والجرجاني
شرح صحيح مسلم - حسن أبو الأشبال
رسالة ابن القيم إلى أحد إخوانه - ط الشرق الأوسط
حاشية البجيرمي على الخطيب = تحفة الحبيب على شرح الخطيب
جواهر البلاغة في المعاني والبيان والبديع
أعلام السيرة النبوية في القرن الثاني للهجرة
فتح السلام شرح عمدة الأحكام من فتح الباري
المنتخب في ذكر نسب قبائل العرب
البيان والتعريف في أسباب ورود الحديث الشريف
التفسير القيم = تفسير القرآن الكريم لابن القيم
نونية ابن القيم الكافية الشافية - ط عطاءات العلم
نيل الأوطار شرح منتقى الأخبار - ط الحديث
قواعد التجويد على رواية حفص عن عاصم بن أبي النجود
شرح صحيح البخاري - عبد الكريم الخضير
منهج الإمام أحمد في إعلال الأحاديث
السيرة النبوية كما جاءت في الأحاديث الصحيحة
المعتصر من شرح مختصر الأصول من علم الأصول
الفقه المنهجي على مذهب الإمام الشافعي
مفهوم التفسير والتأويل والاستنباط والتدبر والمفسر
الرسائل الحربية في عصر الدولة الأيوبية
حاشية ابن عابدين = رد المحتار ط الحلبي
فائدة جليلة في قواعد الأسماء الحسنى
التسهيل في فقه الإمام أحمد - وزارة الأوقاف الكويتية
موجز التاريخ الإسلامي من عهد آدم إلى عصرنا الحاضر
السيرة النبوية الصحيحة محاولة لتطبيق قواعد المحدثين في نقد روايات السيرة النبوية
نضرة النعيم في مكارم أخلاق الرسول الكريم
سبل السلام شرح بلوغ المرام - ط الحديث
اللؤلؤ المكنون في سيرة النبي المأمون
غاية المرام في تخريج أحاديث الحلال والحرام
الروح - ابن القيم - ط عطاءات العلم

BookNamesEnum.title: BookNamesEnum

references.title: references
references.description: The list of references used in the response

tool_calls.title: tool_calls
tool_calls.description: The list of tool calls made by the assistant.

references.title: references
references.description: The list of references used in the response

tool_calls.title: tool_calls
tool_calls.description: The list of tool calls made by the assistant.

index.description: The location of the reference in the response
index.title: index

number.description: The reference number in the response
number.title: number

model.description:
The model to use for the completion. For the Fanar-Sadiq and Fanar-Sadiq-Agentic models, the following LLM parameters are not used.
Islamic-RAG is replaced with Fanar-Sadiq and will be removed soon. Please use Fanar-Sadiq instead.

enable_thinking.title: Enable Thinking
enable_thinking.description: Whether to enable the thinking role in the conversation. This only applies if the model supports it. Currently, only the Fanar-C-2-27B model supports this parameter with additional authorization.

frequency_penalty.title: Frequency Penalty
frequency_penalty.description: A penalty for how much new tokens should avoid repeating existing ones.

logit_bias.title: Logit Bias
logit_bias.description: Modify the likelihood of specified tokens appearing in the completion.

logprobs.title: Logprobs
logprobs.description: Whether to return log probabilities of the output tokens or not.

top_logprobs.title: Top Logprobs
top_logprobs.description: An integer between 0 and 20 specifying the number of most likely tokens toreturn at each token position, each with an associated log probability.

max_tokens.title: Max Tokens
max_tokens.description: The maximum number of tokens that can be generated in the chat completion.

n.title: N
n.description: How many chat completion choices to generate for each input message.

presence_penalty.title: Presence Penalty
presence_penalty.description: Number between -2.0 and 2.0. Positive values penalize new tokens based onwhether they appear in the text so far, increasing the model's likelihood totalk about new topics.

stop.title: Stop
stop.description: Up to 4 sequences where the API will stop generating further tokens.

stream.title: Stream
stream.description: Whether to stream back partial progress as tokens are generated.

temperature.title: Temperature
temperature.description: The sampling temperature, where 0.0 means deterministic output.

top_p.title: Top P
top_p.description: Controls the cumulative probability of the top tokens to consider.

best_of.title: Best Of
best_of.description: Number of output sequences that are generated from the prompt.

top_k.title: Top K
top_k.description: Controls the number of top tokens to consider.

min_p.title: Min P
min_p.description: Represents the minimum probability for a token to be considered, relative to the probability of the most likely token.

repetition_penalty.title: Repetition Penalty
repetition_penalty.description: A penalty for repeating the same tokens in the generated output.

length_penalty.title: Length Penalty
length_penalty.description: Penalizes sequences based on their length. Used in beam search.

early_stopping.title: Early Stopping
early_stopping.description: Controls the stopping condition for beam-based methods.

stop_token_ids.title: Stop Token Ids
stop_token_ids.description: List of tokens that stop the generation when they are generated.

ignore_eos.title: Ignore Eos
ignore_eos.description: Whether to ignore the EOS token and continue generating tokens after the EOS token is generated.

min_tokens.title: Min Tokens
min_tokens.description: Minimum number of tokens to generate per output sequence before EOS or stop_token_ids can be generated.

skip_special_tokens.title: Skip Special Tokens
skip_special_tokens.description: Whether to skip special tokens in the output.

spaces_between_special_tokens.title: Spaces Between Special Tokens
spaces_between_special_tokens.description: Whether to add spaces between special tokens in the output.

truncate_prompt_tokens.title: Truncate Prompt Tokens
truncate_prompt_tokens.description: If set to an integer k, will use only the last k tokens from the prompt

prompt_logprobs.title: Prompt Logprobs
prompt_logprobs.description: Number of log probabilities to return per prompt token.

book_names.title: Book Names
book_names.description: List of book names to use for the Fanar-Sadiq model.

preferred_sources.title: Preferred Sources
preferred_sources.description: List the preferred sources to use for the Fanar-Sadiq model, in order of priority, with fallback sources used if needed. Accepts predefined source names or values starting with 'digital_seerah'.

exclude_sources.title: Exclude Sources
exclude_sources.description: List of sources to exclude from the Fanar-Sadiq model. Accepts predefined source names or values starting with 'digital_seerah'.

filter_sources.title: Filter Sources
filter_sources.description: List of sources to filter from the Fanar-Sadiq model. Accepts predefined source names or values starting with 'digital_seerah'.

madhab.title: Madhab
madhab.description: List of madhab (Islamic school of thought) to filter by for the Fanar-Sadiq-Agentic model.

restrict_to_islamic.title: Restrict To Islamic
restrict_to_islamic.description: When enabled for Fanar-Sadiq model, only Islamic content prompts will be accepted. Non-Islamic content will be rejected.

persona.title: Persona
persona.description: Custom persona that controls the assistant's voice and identity for the Fanar-Sadiq model. Free-form text; only supported for Fanar-Sadiq.

id.title: Id
id.description: A unique identifier for the chat completion

choices.title: Choices
choices.description: A list of chat completion choices.Can be more than one if `n` is greater than 1.

created.title: Created
created.description: The Unix timestamp (in seconds) of when the chat completion was created.

model.title: Model
model.description: The model used for the chat completion.

usage.description: Usage statistics for the completion request.

metadata.title: Metadata
metadata.description: Additional metadata associated with the completion.

id.title: id
id.description: The unique identifier for the tool call

name.title: name
name.description: The name of the tool called

arguments.title: arguments
arguments.description: The arguments passed to the tool

result.title: result
result.description: The result returned by the tool

structured_content.title: structured_content
structured_content.description: The structured content returned by the tool

is_error.title: is_error
is_error.description: Indicates if there was an error during the tool call

b64_json.title: B64 Json
b64_json.description: The base64-encoded JSON of the generated image.

revised.title: Revised
revised.description: Indicates whether the prompt was revised before generation.

revised_prompt.title: Revised Prompt
revised_prompt.description: The prompt used for generation, which may be revised from the original prompt.

b64_json.title: B64 Json
b64_json.description: The base64-encoded JSON of the generated image.

revised.title: Revised
revised.description: Indicates whether the prompt was revised before generation.

revised_prompt.title: Revised Prompt
revised_prompt.description: The prompt used for generation, which may be revised from the original prompt.

model.description: The model to use for the image generation.

prompt.title: Prompt
prompt.description: A text description of the desired image.

revise.title: Revise
revise.description: Whether to automatically revise the prompt to enhance style, quality, and cultural alignment for improved generation results.

id.title: Id
id.description: A unique identifier for the image generation.

created.title: Created
created.description: The timestamp of when the image was created.

data.title: Data
data.description: A list of the generated image.

id.title: Id
id.description: A unique identifier for the models.

model.description: The model to use for the poem generation.

prompt.title: Prompt
prompt.description: A text description of the desired poem.

example.prompt: Write a poem about the sea

id.title: Id
id.description: A unique identifier for the poem generation.

speaker.title: Speaker
speaker.description: The speaker label for the segment.

start_time.title: Start Time
start_time.description: The start time of the segment in seconds.

end_time.title: End Time
end_time.description: The end time of the segment in seconds.

duration.title: Duration
duration.description: The duration of the segment in seconds.

model.description: The model to use for safety filtering.

response.title: Response
response.description: The model's response to the prompt.

safety.title: Safety
safety.description: The safety score for general safety aspects such as toxicity, violence, self-harm, etc.

cultural_awareness.title: Cultural Awareness
cultural_awareness.description: The cultural awareness score for aspects such as stereotypes, insensitive content, and bias.

segments.title: Segments
segments.description: The list of segments for the transcribed text.

id.title: Id
id.description: A unique identifier for the speech-to-text.

json.description: The transcribed text in JSON format.

id.title: Id
id.description: A unique identifier for the speech-to-text.

json.description: The transcribed text in JSON format.

id.title: Id
id.description: A unique identifier for the speech-to-text.

srt.title: Srt
srt.description: The transcribed text in SRT format.

id.title: Id
id.description: A unique identifier for the speech-to-text.

model.description: The model to use for the text-to-speech.

input.title: Input
input.description: The text to generate audio for.

voice.title: Voice
voice.description:
The voice to use for the text-to-speech. Details are below:
VoiceGenderSupported LanguagesAccentEmotion
AbdulrahmanMaleArabicStandard✓
AmeliaFemaleEnglishBritish—
EmilyFemaleEnglishAmerican—
HamadMaleArabicStandard—
HarryMaleEnglishBritish—
HudaFemaleArabicStandard—
JakeMaleEnglishAmerican—
JasimMaleArabicStandard—
NoorFemaleArabicStandard—
RadwaFemaleArabicStandard✓

response_format.description: The format of the output audio. Supported formats are `mp3` and `wav`.

quran_reciter.description: The Quran reciter to use when using Fanar-Sadiq-TTS-1 model for Quranic text.

with_emotion.title: With Emotion
with_emotion.description: Enable emotional speech synthesis. **Only applicable to `Fanar-Aura-TTS-2` and to voices where `emotion: true` in GET /v1/voices.** When the selected voice does not support emotion, or when used with `Fanar-Sadiq-TTS-1`, the request is rejected with a 422 error. Defaults to false.

stream.title: Stream
stream.description: Stream the audio as it is generated. Supported for both `wav` and `mp3`.

id.title: Id
id.description: A unique identifier for the tokenization.

model.description: The model to use for the translation.

text.title: Text
text.description: The text to translate. It must not exceed 4,000 words.

langpair.description:
The source-target language pair for translation, the current allowed possible values are:
- en-ar: for English to Arabic
- ar-en: for Arabic to English

preprocessing.description:
How to preprocess the text before translation:
- default: Splits all sentences by natural punctuation (full stops, question marks, etc.), trims away extra whitespace, and removes HTML tags.
- preserve_html: Does the same as “default”, but tries to preserve HTML tags.
- preserve_whitespace: Aggressively tries to maintain all extra leading/trailing whitespaces and joins sentences across newlines to translate fixed-width content, for example.
- preserve_whitespace_and_html: Combines the previous two.

id.title: Id
id.description: A unique identifier for the translation.

name.title: Name
name.description: The English name of the voice. This is the identifier passed to the TTS endpoint.

name_ar.title: Name Ar
name_ar.description: The Arabic display name of the voice, when available.

type.title: Type
type.description: Whether this is a built-in public voice or a personalized voice registered for this API key.

emotion.title: Emotion
emotion.description: Whether this voice supports emotional speech synthesis. When true, you may set `with_emotion: true` on POST /v1/audio/speech to enable emotional rendering.

voices.title: Voices
voices.description: Available voices. Always includes the built-in public voices. Includes personalized voices registered for this API key when voice personalization is authorized.

Bearer.description: Provide your API key in the Authorization header using the Bearer scheme.

tags.name: Authentication
tags.description:
All API endpoints require a **Bearer** token. Include it in the `Authorization` header:

```
Authorization: Bearer YOUR_API_KEY
```
